title: Crispy Earthy Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and crunchy stir fry made with sautéed earthy mushrooms and creamy sauce, perfect for vegetarians.

ingredients.name: Earth Mushrooms
ingredients.notes: Any variety of earthy mushrooms work well

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic and stir-fry until softened, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the earth mushrooms and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, until they start to release their moisture.
Pour in the creamy sauce and soy sauce (if using) and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the stir-fry to a serving platter and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped scallions or cilantro, if desired.
